description: I am a mechanical engineer by education, a programmer by profession, and by passion. For ten years, I led a team producing metal parts as a production manager. For over four years, I have been developing in the fascinating world of programming. I specialize in frontend technologies. I already have my first backend experience and am starting to work as a fullstack developer. I systematically incorporate AI tools into my development workflow. In my free time, I play football, run, hike, and read books, preferably on geopolitics and personal development.

jobs.title: Full stack developer
